CVE-2020-25791.title: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 f ...
CVE-2020-25791.summary: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 for Rust. In the Chunk implementation, the array size is not checked when constructed with unit().

CVE-2020-25792.title: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 f ...
CVE-2020-25792.summary: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 for Rust. In the Chunk implementation, the array size is not checked when constructed with pair().

CVE-2020-25793.title: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 f ...
CVE-2020-25793.summary: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 for Rust. In the Chunk implementation, the array size is not checked when constructed with From<InlineArray<A, T>>.

CVE-2020-25794.title: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 f ...
CVE-2020-25794.summary: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 for Rust. In the Chunk implementation, clone can have a memory-safety issue upon a panic.

CVE-2020-25795.title: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 f ...
CVE-2020-25795.summary: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 for Rust. In the Chunk implementation, insert_from can have a memory-safety issue upon a panic.

CVE-2020-25796.title: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 f ...
CVE-2020-25796.summary: An issue was discovered in the sized-chunks crate through 0.6.2 for Rust. In the InlineArray implementation, an unaligned reference may be generated for a type that has a large alignment requirement.
